text:
Shipped 3 updates this week to keep the infrastructure humming. We routed some cross-region traffic for nova-fast and reduced vCPU pressure on the developer earnings backend. Basically: smoother scaling when things get heavy, so your ideas come to life quicker. Also finally fixed the theme and focus states on the auth modal, because clicking a button should actually feel nice. All merged and live in the repo. 🍄🌱
